title: Native-style dialogue workshop
subtitle: Study a compact realistic exchange and reuse it.
duolingoBridge: B1 Med trains native-style but level-appropriate French: natural chunks, connected answers, listening strategy, and practical output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: notice short natural turns.
Knowledge point 2: reuse chunks in your own dialogue.

sections.title: Natural tools
rows: shall we do it like that?
I will confirm that with you

items.fr: On se retrouve vers dix-huit heures, ça te va ?
items.en: Shall we meet around six p.m., does that work for you?
items.es: Nos vemos hacia las dieciocho, ¿te va bien?

items.fr: Pas vraiment, je finis le travail à dix-huit heures trente.
items.en: Not really, I finish work at six thirty p.m.
items.es: No realmente, termino el trabajo a las dieciocho treinta.

items.fr: D’accord, on peut dire dix-neuf heures devant la gare.
items.en: Okay, we can say seven p.m. in front of the station.
items.es: De acuerdo, podemos decir a las diecinueve delante de la estación.

items.en: Yes, that suits me much better.
items.es: Sí, eso me conviene mucho más.

items.fr: Parfait, je te confirme ça par message.
items.en: Perfect, I will confirm that with you by message.
items.es: Perfecto, te lo confirmo por mensaje.
